detail.description:
JOIN THE MAGICAL BATTLE IN NIGHT AT THE VALLEY!
Step into the enchanting world of Emerald Village, where Moo and Lulu need your help to defend their quaint town from an invasion of magical creatures! In this idle tower defense RPG, you’ll build, upgrade, and strategize to protect the valley from waves of whimsical yet dangerous foes. Ready for an idle game adventure packed with strategy and mystery? 

DEFEND WITH STRATEGY!
As a lone defender, you’ll command Moo and Lulu to fend off mystical enem
detail.releaseNotes:
- Bug fixes and other improvements

Thank you for playing our game!
